use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ATTENTION DEFICIT HYPERACTIVITY DISORDER (ADHD) IN PEDIATRIC PATIENTS

indications.text:
EVEKEO ODT is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in pediatric patients 6 to 17 years
of age [see Clinical Studies (14)].

EVEKEO ODT is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in pediatric patients 6 to 17 years
of age.

EVEKEO ODT is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in pediatric patients 3 to 17 years
of age.

EVEKEO ODT is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in pediatric patients 6 to 17 years
of age.

EVEKEO ODT is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in pediatric patients 3 to 17 years
of age.
